titleStmt.title: SII 25.130: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 130. (A.R. No. 130 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the first prākāra of the Agastyēśvara shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
This record is dated in the 2nd regnal year, Dhanus 11, śu 10, Wednesday, Aśvati-nakshatra which details are not sufficient to final out the equivalant.

It records an order of the king at the instance of tiruvāykkēḻvi regarding the sale of lands in the old dēvadāṉa village Kāḍavadarāyaṉkuḍikkāḍu alias Māḷavakaṟpaganallūr in Kaṅgāṇip-paṟṟu in Kalavāyināḍu to a certain Aḻagaṉ Vāṉōrpirāṉ alias Vāṉavaṉ Brahmādarāyar, one of the Āriya-brāhmaṇas, probably hailing from Śōnāḍu by Kaṇḍaṉ-Udayañcheydāṉ alias Kāṅgēyaṉ. It states that the lands thus sold should be brought under cultivation by the measuring span padiṉeṇ-sāṇ-kōl and pay the taxes kaḍamai and antarāyam collected from the two crops perumpū and kuṟuvai raised in the aforesaid lands to the deity Āṇḍapiḷḷaiyār in the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār at Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu. The kārāṇmai made over to the Brahmādarāyar was exempted from the previous taxes like achchu, veṭṭippāṭṭam pañjupili, sanduvikkiragappēṟu and others. The ratio of the kaḍamai and antarāyam to be paid for each crop are specified in detail.
Udaiyadivākara-mūvēndavēḷāṉ and Sundarapāṇḍyak-kāṅgēyaṉ are referred to as the signatories of the order stated above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiruvāyk keḻvikku mel tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī
sundara pāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2vatu dhanu nāyiṟṟu 10 1 kiḻakkeyum pūrvvapa
kṣattu daśamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aśvati nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷa nāṭ
ṭu brahmadeya ntirupputtūr Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa ṉāyanār śrī
Āṇṭa piḷḷaiyāṟku kaṇṭaṉutaiyañ ceytānāṉa kāṅ
keyaṉeṉ kalavāyi nāṭṭu kaṅkāṇippaṟṟāṉa kāṭavatarayaṉ kuṭi
k kāṭāṉa māḷavakaṟpakanallū cuṟṟu muṟṟilum paḻan tevatāṉamum
taṉmatāṉa lāka vaṉta nilattukku coṇāṭṭu
tta Āriyabrāhmaṇaril Aḻakaṉ vāṉorpirāṉāṉa vāṉavaṉ brahmā
tirāyaṟ karāmayarka viṟṟukkuṭutta Inilattukku patiṉeṇcāṉ ko
lāl payir pārttup perumpūvum kuṟuvaiyum viḷaiṉta ṉilattukku kaṭamai ka la
marakkāliṉāl Irukala nellum Antarāyam Accukkum patiṉāṟu meṉi
Digital edition of SII 25.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
